title: centaurea aspera
intro: Centaurea aspera, also known as Rough Chervil or Rough Centaury, is a perennial plant in the daisy family, characterized by its hairy stems and jagged leaves. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, fever, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Centaurea aspera include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health conditions. Centaurea aspera can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments, from colds and flu to skin conditions and gastrointestinal issues.
